questions.question:
Bit stuffing refers to



Computer Networks: NIELIT 2017 OCT Scientific Assistant A (CS)
options: Inserting a \( ’0’ \) in user data stream to differentiate it with a flag
Inserting a \( ’0’ \) in flag stream to avoid ambiguity
